chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-8308 of 2019 Date Order with Signature of Judge Priority 1. For hearing of Misc. No.36612 of 2019. 2. For hearing of Main case. ------------------------------------------ 05.03.2020: Syed Ansar Hussain Zaidi, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Altamash Faisal Arab, advocate for respondent No.2. Mr. Muhammad Nishat Warsi, Deputy Attorney General, Pakistan. ------------------- In compliance of order dated 11.02.2020, learned counsel for respondent No.2 has filed statement dated 05.03.2020 which is taken on record. As per the above statement respondent No.2 has deducted an amount of Rs.589,248.00 from the petitioner’s pension at the rate of Rs.10,912.00 per month towards house rent. Learned counsel for respondent No.2 states that house rent was deducted from pension up till December 2019 whereafter pension is being paid to the petitioner on monthly basis. Regarding the above mentioned amount of Rs.589,248.00 deducted from the petitioner’s pension on account of house rent, he undertakes on behalf of respondent No.2 that the entire said amount shall be refunded to the petitioner within sixty days from today. Learned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied with the above undertaking and seeks disposal of this petition in terms thereof. By consent, the petition and listed application stand disposed of in view of the above undertaking with no order as to costs. J U D G E J U D G E Qurban/PA*
